title: Our New Feature & Feedback process!
excerpt: Hello community! You may have already noticed some changes to our feature request category and I am super excited to share that the the new community feature request process is officially LIVE and even have a great video…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community! You may have already noticed some changes to our feature request category and I am super excited to share that the the new community feature request process is officially LIVE and even have a great video to go along with it!

A few tips to get started:

  1. Make sure you are signed into the community (If you have never logged into our community, you will need to create a new account. We recommend using the same email as you use for your monday.com account)

  2. Make sure to read all about our new features process to familiarize yourself with the forum and our new process.

  3. Before posting use the search function (top right corner) to see if your idea already exist and vote!

  4. Try out the different filters, including the votes filter to see our top-voted features

We can’t wait to see all the great feedback, ideas and features you share with us and as always, if you have any questions, feel free to write them below!↓↓↓↓↓
